goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'entrance fee', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 09:15' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number, entrance fee, and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 09:15 and should depart from bishops stortford
The train should leave on thursday and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
